channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: UConn honors coach Geno Auriemma as he tries to become NCAA all-time wins leader
item.description: STORRS, Conn. (AP) — Geno Auriemma has spent four decades building UConn into the standard for women's basketball. The school celebrated those 40 years Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Manfred says Tampa area politicians will be given time to sort out Rays' ballpark situation
item.description: Tampa area politicians will be given time to sort out the Rays’ ballpark situation following Hurricane Milton, and baseball Commissioner Rob Manfred said there has been no thought to allowing the team to explore a relocation.
item.dc:creator: Ronald Blum, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Trump feuded with NFL players in his first term. Now, some are busting out his dance moves
item.description: If the latest dance sweeping the sports world is any indication, Donald Trump and the NFL might get along much better in his second term in the White House than they did the first time around.
item.dc:creator: ARNIE STAPLETON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Cubs trade for Cleveland reliever Eli Morgan; Wisdom DFA'd
item.description: CLEVELAND, Ind. — The Cubs are trading for Cleveland relief pitcher Eli Morgan. As a result of adding Morgan to the 40-man, Patrick Wisdom was designated for assignment. Morgan, 28, had the best season of his career in 2024 with a 1.93 ERA with Cleveland in 42 innings.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, WGN 9

item.title: Jake Paul expresses interest in WWE role following win over Mike Tyson
item.description: Jake Paul has emerged as a superstar in boxing, but could WWE be another quest to conquer? He expressed interested in possibly having a role in the ring.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Eli Manning, Antonio Gates and Jared Allen headline the 25 semifinalists for football Hall of Fame
item.description: Two-time Super Bowl MVP Eli Manning, prolific tight end Antonio Gates and dominant pass rusher Jared Allen are among the 25 modern-era candidates for the 2025 Pro Football Hall of Fame class.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jets owner Woody Johnson floated benching Aaron Rodgers before firing coach, GM: report
item.description: New York Jets owner Woody Johnson's frustration began after a 9-10 loss to the Broncos, and according to one report, his first suggestion was to bench Aaron Rodgers.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: San Jose State volleyball faces Mountain West tourney uncertainty after loss to Fresno State
item.description: San Jose State could potentially be matched up against one of four schools that forfeited to the Spartans in next week's conference tournament.
item.dc:creator: Justice delos Santos, The Mercury News

item.title: Bay Area News Group high school football predictions: Week 13, 2024
item.description: Our guys pick 16 playoff games scheduled for this weekend, including Pittsburg-De La Salle, St. Francis-St. Ignatius, Los Gatos-Riordan, Cardinal Newman-San Ramon Valley, Menlo-Atherton at Wilcox.
item.dc:creator: Darren Sabedra, The Mercury News

item.title: An emotional Rafael Nadal retires at the Davis Cup after he loses and Spain is eliminated
item.description: MALAGA, Spain (AP) — Rafael Nadal bit his lower lip and his reddened eyes welled with tears as he stood alongside his Davis Cup teammates for Spain's national anthem Tuesday before what he — and everyone — knew might be the last match of his career.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Mexico overcomes 2-goal deficit, reaches CONCACAF Nations League semifinals with US, Canada, Panama
item.description: Mexico overcame a two-goal, first-leg deficit and reached the CONCACAF Nations League semifinals with a 4-0 win over Honduras at Toluca on Tuesday night behind two goals from Henry Martín and one each from Raúl Jiménez and Jorge Sánchez.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: No. 1 Kansas overcomes sluggish start, beats UNC Wilmington 84-66 to give Bill Self 800th career win
item.description: LAWRENCE, Kan. (AP) — Hunter Dickinson had 15 points and 15 rebounds, Dajuan Harris Jr. scored 16 points, and No. 1 Kansas shrugged off a sluggish start to beat UNC Wilmington 84-66 on Tuesday night and give Jayhawks coach Bill Self his 800th career win.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Brayden Point's OT winner helps Lightning rally past Penguins, 3-2
item.description: Brayden Point scored at 3:58 of overtime and the Tampa Bay Lightning rallied to beat the Pittsburgh Penguins 3-2 on Tuesday night. Point’s overtime winner was his 10th goal of the season. Anthony Cirelli scored his fifth goal of the season. Andrei Vasilevskiy stopped 17 shots for Tampa Bay.
item.dc:creator: DAN SCIFO, WFLA, NBC

item.title: The Jets are a dumpster fire
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) -- The Jets are a remarkable dumpster fire. Head coach Robert Saleh fired. GM Joe Douglas fired. Offensive coordinator Nathaniel Hackett demoted. They are a 3 and 8 football team and will most certainly miss the playoffs for the 14th consecutive year.
item.dc:creator: Marc Malusis, PIX 11

item.title: Lynne Roberts leaves Utah for WNBA job
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - In a shocking announcement Tuesday evening, Lynne Roberts is leaving the University of Utah women's basketball program to become the head coach of the Los Angeles Sparks of the WNBA.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Jets fire general manager Joe Douglas after team goes 3-8 to start the season: AP source
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) – The New York Jets have fired general manager Joe Douglas, a person with knowledge of the decision told The Associated Press on Tuesday. Douglas was in the final year of his contract after being hired in 2019.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: USD Men's Soccer to host UC Davis in NCAA Tournament
item.description: The Toreros are going to the big dance, though they don't necessarily like the song that's playing. The Toreros earned an automatic bid to the NCAA Tournament after they captured their third straight West Coast Conference Title on Saturday with their (1-0) win over Loyola Marymount.
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5

item.title: Giants bench Daniel Jones, give nod to Tommy DeVito
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) -- The Giants did exactly what you expected today in one respect, they benched starter Daniel Jones, and in doing so, his days as a member of the Giants franchise are over. Who will be the starter on Sunday against Tampa Bay? Jersey's own, Tommy DeVito.
item.dc:creator: Marc Malusis, PIX 11

item.title: Beyoncé performing at halftime of NFL Christmas Day game on Netflix
item.description: Beyoncé is coming to your home on Christmas — provided you have Netflix and are tuning in to the Baltimore Ravens-Houston Texans game.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Denver Broncos def. Atlanta Falcons 38-6
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—Bo Nix made a statement Sunday, playing like a seasoned veteran despite his rookie status. The Broncos quarterback set career highs in passing yards, touchdowns, and completion percentage as Denver cruised to a decisive 38-6 victory over the Falcons.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Bears vs. Packers: Injuries, inactives, key matchups and more
item.description: CHICAGO — It's been a tumultuous several weeks for the Bears. It seems like forever since they went into the bye week feeling good with a 4-2 record. Since then, there's been a shocking Hail Mary loss in Washington and lifeless defeats to Arizona and New England.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Blackhawks place defenseman Seth Jones on injured reserve with right foot injury
item.description: VANCOUVER, British Columbia (AP) — The Blackhawks placed defenseman Seth Jones on injured reserve Saturday with a right foot injury. The 30-year-old Jones had played in each of Chicago's first 17 games, going into Saturday's loss in Vancouver, averaging more than 25 1/2 minutes of ice time.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Trump attends UFC championship fight in New York, taking break from Cabinet picks
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump walked out to a roaring standing ovation just ahead of the start of the UFC pay-per-view card at Madison Square Garden on Saturday night, combining two things close to his heart: fierce battles inside the octagon and New York City.
item.dc:creator: Will Weissert, WFLA, NBC

item.title: CMU Football looks to keep their playoff hopes alive
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—After a six-game winning streak, the Colorado Mesa University Mavericks rolled into Rapid City with momentum, only to have their playoff hopes stalled by South Dakota Mines in a gritty 17-14 defeat.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: CMU drops final game at home against Western Colorado
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—After a six-game winning streak, Colorado Mesa University was dealt a setback by South Dakota Mines. Now, the Mavericks return to their home field with the stakes as high as the Rocky Mountains, aiming to secure a playoff spot.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Donovan Mitchell scores 37, Cavaliers stay perfect and improve to 14-0 with 144-126 win over Bulls
item.description: Donovan Mitchell scored a season-high 37 points, Darius Garland had 29 and the Cleveland Cavaliers continued one of the best starts in league history, improving to 14-0 with a 144-126 win over the Chicago Bulls on Friday night in an NBA Cup game.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: No. 13 Purdue rediscovers strong post presence in 87-78 win over No. 2 Alabama
item.description: Boilermakers forward Trey Kaufman-Renn made 12 of 23 shots, scored a career-high 26 points and grabbed eight rebounds as No. 13 Purdue handed No. 2 Alabama an 87-78 defeat that was eerily reminiscent of last season's 92-86 loss to the Boilermakers in Toronto.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL MAROT, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Bountiful headed back to 5A championship game
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Bountiful Redhawks are headed back to the 5A championship game. Bountiful cruised past Brighton in the 5A semifinals Friday at Rice-Eccles Stadium, 24-8, and will take on Roy for the 5A state title next week.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Girls Volleyball: Cathedral 3, Los Alamitos 0
item.description: The Lady Dons take on the Griffins of Los Alamitos in the first round of the 2024 CIF Open Division Championships.
item.dc:creator: Joaquin Duncan, Fox 5

item.title: Where to watch Mike Tyson-Jake Paul fight in Bay Area: Bars showing heavyweight bout
item.description: (KRON) -- Boxing legend and former heavyweight world champion Mike Tyson is fighting YouTuber-turned-boxer Jake Paul in a professional boxing match on Friday at AT&T Stadium in Arlington, Texas.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4

item.title: Vasilevskiy stars as the Lightning stop the Jets' 7-game win streak with a 4-1 victory
item.description: Andrei Vasilevskiy made 24 saves in his 300th NHL win, and the Tampa Bay Lightning stopped Winnipeg’s seven-game win streak with a 4-1 victory over the Jets. Vasilevskiy is the 40th goaltender in league history to win 300 games.
item.dc:creator: JOHN KREISER, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Bucs bring back Super Bowl winning safety Mike Edwards
item.description: The Tampa Bay Buccaneers have bolstered their ailing secondary by claiming Mike Edwards off of waivers from the Tennessee Titans, the team announced Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Garrett Phillips, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Finally healthy, Puka Nacua poised for strong finish
item.description: LOS ANGELES (ABC4 Sports) - Puka Nacua was not supposed to be this good, this quickly. As a fifth round draft pick out of BYU by the L.A. Rams in 2023, Nacua took the NFL by storm, setting rookie records with 104 catches for 1,486 yards.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
